description: Free tier commercial-use restrictions reiterated; violating accounts may be limited
description_zh: Free tier 重申不可商用要求，违规账号会被限制

description: Creator tier changed from $11 to $22; new subscribers still get 50% off the first month
description_zh: Creator tier 价格从 $11 调整为 $22，新订户首月仍享 50% 折扣

description: Generative Credits renamed to Premium Credits with upfront cost estimates added
description_zh: Generative Credits 重命名为 Premium Credits，新增 upfront 成本预估提示

description: Audio dubbing without lip-sync became unlimited on all paid tiers
description_zh: Audio dubbing（无 lip-sync 翻译）对所有付费 tier 完全无限制

description: Team plan was replaced by Business plan; existing users keep legacy pricing
description_zh: Team 套餐被 Business 套餐替代，老用户保留原价

description: Burst pricing added, allowing agents to temporarily exceed concurrency limits up to 3x
description_zh: 新增 burst pricing，允许 agent 临时突破并发上限至 3 倍

description: Twilio, Telnyx, and Vonage telephony costs are now called out separately for transparency
description_zh: 明确将 Twilio / Telnyx / Vonage telephony 费用单独标注，提升价格透明度

description: Community released OpenF5 TTS, trained on the F5 framework under Apache 2.0
description_zh: 社区发布 OpenF5 TTS，基于 F5 框架训练，采用 Apache 2.0 许可

description: Community fine-tunes expanded to Vietnamese, Arabic, Portuguese, and Russian
description_zh: 社区微调版本扩展到越南语、阿拉伯语、葡萄牙语、俄语

description: Suno entry added: free plan is non-commercial; paid songs include commercial-use rights
description_zh: 新增 Suno 条目：免费版不可商用，付费生成歌曲授予商业使用权

description: Descript added for podcast cleanup, text editing, captions, and AI voice fixes
description_zh: 新增 Descript，用于播客清理、文字剪辑、字幕和 AI 补录

description: Adobe Podcast added for low-friction Enhance Speech cleanup workflows
description_zh: 新增 Adobe Podcast，用于低门槛 Enhance Speech 人声清理流程

description: OpusClip added for long-to-short creator clipping workflows
description_zh: 新增 OpusClip，用于创作者长内容拆短视频流程

description: Riverside added for recording, transcript editing, and Magic Clips workflows
description_zh: 新增 Riverside，用于录制、文字剪辑和 Magic Clips 工作流

description: YouTube Auto Dubbing added for YouTube-native multilingual audio tracks
description_zh: 新增 YouTube Auto Dubbing，用于 YouTube 原生多语言音轨

description: Podcastle added for browser podcast recording, editing, AI voices, and hosting
description_zh: 新增 Podcastle，用于浏览器播客录制、剪辑、AI voices 和托管

description: Stable Audio Open added for open short audio and sound design generation
description_zh: 新增 Stable Audio Open，用于开放短音频和声音设计生成

description: NotebookLM added for source-grounded Audio Overviews and knowledge briefings
description_zh: 新增 NotebookLM，用于基于资料来源的 Audio Overview 和知识简报

description: VibeVoice added for experimental long-form multi-speaker conversational TTS
description_zh: 新增 VibeVoice，用于实验性长篇多说话人对话式 TTS

description: Retell AI added for managed production phone and web voice agents
description_zh: 新增 Retell AI，用于托管式生产电话和网页 Voice Agent

description: LiveKit added as open-source realtime audio infrastructure for voice agents
description_zh: 新增 LiveKit，作为 Voice Agent 的开源实时音频基础设施

description: Deepgram added for low-latency streaming speech-to-text pipelines
description_zh: 新增 Deepgram，用于低延迟流式语音识别链路

description: Cartesia added for low-latency streaming TTS in voice agents
description_zh: 新增 Cartesia，用于 Voice Agent 的低延迟流式 TTS

description: OpenAI Realtime API added for native speech-to-speech voice agents
description_zh: 新增 OpenAI Realtime API，用于原生 speech-to-speech Voice Agent

description: Pipecat added as an open-source realtime voice agent framework
description_zh: 新增 Pipecat，作为开源实时语音 Agent 框架

description: Silero VAD added for open-source voice activity detection workflows
description_zh: 新增 Silero VAD，用于开源语音活动检测工作流

description: Suno data reviewed from official source pages
description_zh: Suno 数据已根据官方来源页面复核

description: ElevenLabs data reviewed from official source pages
description_zh: ElevenLabs 数据已根据官方来源页面复核

description: WellSaid added for licensed brand voiceover studio workflows
description_zh: 新增 WellSaid，用于授权品牌旁白 Studio 工作流

description: Murf AI added for marketing, training, and product voiceover workflows
description_zh: 新增 Murf AI，用于营销、培训和产品旁白工作流

description: Resemble AI added for voice cloning, pay-as-you-go TTS, and governance workflows
description_zh: 新增 Resemble AI，用于声音克隆、按量 TTS 和治理工作流

description: Chatterbox added as an open-source self-hosted TTS and voice cloning route
description_zh: 新增 Chatterbox，作为开源自托管 TTS 与声音克隆路线

description: Udio added for AI music generation, stems, and creator music exploration
description_zh: 新增 Udio，用于 AI 音乐生成、stems 和创作者配乐探索

description: Beatoven.ai added for licensed AI background music and sound effects
description_zh: 新增 Beatoven.ai，用于有授权记录的 AI 背景音乐和音效

description: AudioCraft added as a self-hosted research route for music and sound generation
description_zh: 新增 AudioCraft，作为音乐和音效生成的自托管研究路线

description: WhisperX added for self-hosted transcription, word timestamps, and diarization
description_zh: 新增 WhisperX，用于自托管转写、词级时间戳和说话人分离

description: Voicebox added as a local-first open-source voice studio for cloning TTS dictation and agents
description_zh: 新增 Voicebox 作为本地优先的开源声音克隆 TTS 听写和 Agent 语音工作室
